query:
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `gameCombats` (
  `id` int AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  `gameProgressId` int NOT NULL,
  `questId` int NOT NULL,
  `questionId` int NOT NULL,
  `playerAnswer` varchar(500),
  `correctAnswer` varchar(500),
  `isWon` boolean NOT NULL,
  `farmacologiaPointsEarned` int NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
  `timeSpent` int NOT NULL,
  `attemptNumber` int NOT NULL DEFAULT 1,
  `createdAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP
);

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `gameAchievements` (
  `id` int AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  `title` varchar(100) NOT NULL,
  `description` text,
  `icon` varchar(100),
  `condition` varchar(200) NOT NULL,
  `farmacologiaPointsBonus` int NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
  `createdAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP
);

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `gameWeeklyReleases` (
  `id` int AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  `classId` int NOT NULL,
  `weekNumber` int NOT NULL,
  `questIds` text NOT NULL,
  `title` varchar(200),
  `description` text,
  `isReleased` boolean NOT NULL DEFAULT false,
  `releasedAt` timestamp NULL,
  `releasedBy` int,
  `createdAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  `updatedAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP
);

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `playerAvatars` (
  `id` int AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  `memberId` int NOT NULL,
  `characterId` varchar(50),
  `skinTone` varchar(50),
  `hairStyle` varchar(50),
  `hairColor` varchar(50),
  `clothingColor` varchar(50),
  `accessory` varchar(50),
  `createdAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  `updatedAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP
);

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `gameErrorReports` (
  `id` int AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  `memberId` int NOT NULL,
  `classId` int NOT NULL,
  `questId` int,
  `reportType` enum('error','doubt','suggestion') NOT NULL DEFAULT 'error',
  `description` text NOT NULL,
  `status` enum('pending','reviewed','resolved','dismissed') NOT NULL DEFAULT 'pending',
  `teacherResponse` text,
  `resolvedBy` int,
  `resolvedAt` timestamp NULL,
  `createdAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP
);
